message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="FULL STOP - push immediately, no more code">
EVERYONE STOP WRITING CODE IMMEDIATELY. 

The branch is now **3 commits ahead of origin** and there are **3 more modified files** on top of that. Someone committed but STILL didn't push. And someone else is STILL writing new code on top of unpushed commits.

I have asked FOUR TIMES for someone to run `git push`. Nobody has done it.

**Whoever sees this first**: Run `git push` RIGHT NOW. Not after reviewing. Not after writing more code. Just `git push`.

**Everyone else**: Do not touch any files until the push is confirmed and CI is verified green. This is a full stop.
</teammate-message>

input.command: git status && echo "---" && git log origin/main..HEAD --oneline

content.content:
On branch main
Your branch is up to date with 'origin/main'.

nothing to commit, working tree clean
---

toolUseResult.stdout:

content.text: From my perspective, the branch is up to date with origin and the working tree is clean. My push from earlier (`e2cda97`) went through successfully. It's possible other teammates have accumulated more commits since then. Let me verify the remote state.

input.command: git fetch origin 2>&1 && git log origin/main..HEAD --oneline && echo "---" && git log HEAD..origin/main --oneline
input.description: Fetch and compare local vs remote

content.text: Local and remote are in sync. Nothing to push from my end.

content.content: in_progress		Fix tower-sessions version for Axum 0.8 compatibility	CI	main	push	21805285285	30s	2026-02-08T21:00:39Z

toolUseResult.stdout: in_progress		Fix tower-sessions version for Axum 0.8 compatibility	CI	main	push	21805285285	30s	2026-02-08T21:00:39Z

input.content:
From my end: branch is up to date with origin. Working tree is clean. My push (`e2cda97`) went through earlier. `git fetch origin` confirms local and remote are in sync -- zero unpushed commits, zero divergence.

CI run 21805285285 is currently `in_progress` for commit "Fix tower-sessions version for Axum 0.8 compatibility".

If other teammates are seeing 3 commits ahead, they have local commits that were never pushed. Those teammates need to push from their own sessions. I cannot push commits I don't have locally.

I am in full stop mode. Not touching any files until CI is confirmed green.
input.summary: My branch is synced, CI in progress, full stop

routing.summary: My branch is synced, CI in progress, full stop
